title: California Public Records Act Request: CPRA: Flock Safety Aduit

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Records related to the department’s Flock Safety system:

1. Organization Audit in Flock.
The report should include data logged from the period of June 21, 2023, to the date this request is processed. Per Flock's documentation, the Organization Audit is available within the Insights tab and is defined as searches done within the agency.

2. Network Audit in Flock.
The report should include data logged from the period of June 21, 2023, to the date this request is processed. Per Flock's documentation, the Network Audit is available within the Insights tab and is defined as searches of the organization’s Flock network by any agency in the Flock System.

3. Data Sharing
a. The names of agencies and organizations with which the Agency shares ALPR data
b. The names of agencies and organizations from which the Agency receives ALPR data
c. The names of agencies and organizations with which the Agency shares “hot list” information
d. The names of agencies and organizations from which the Agency receives “hot list” information

Please provide the audit data in a structured format such as .csv, .xls, or another machine-readable database filetype.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Anthony Jiminez
